manifest.name: Echo Notes
manifest.author: Pinta
manifest.description: Append each annotation's comment to a running NOTES.md log in the project root — a tiny reference module that demonstrates the importable-module pipeline (consent, the write-files capability, and the §7.12 dispatch).
manifest.sessionCheckboxHint: After the agent applies edits, append each annotation comment to NOTES.md in the project root.

agent:
# Echo Notes — per-submit imported module

You are running the **Echo Notes** imported module (§7.12). It keeps a
simple running log of what the user annotated.

## What to do

For each annotation in `session.annotations`, append one bullet to
`NOTES.md` in the project root:

```
- <ISO date> · <annotation.comment> (<annotation.targets?.[0]?.selector ?? annotation.kind>)
```

Create `NOTES.md` with an `# Annotation log` heading if it doesn't exist;
otherwise append to the end. One Write/Edit pass for all annotations is
fine.

## Rules (do not cross)

- This module declares the **`write-files`** capability. Only write if
  the user granted it (`install.json` → `grantedCapabilities`). If they
  didn't, do nothing and tell them to re-import granting `write-files`.
- **Only ever touch `NOTES.md` inside the project root.** Never write
  anywhere else, never read or write outside the project, never run
  shell commands or make network requests — none are granted.
- This is per-submit work that runs after the source edits land. Report
  completion in the session summary (e.g. "Logged 3 annotations to
  NOTES.md").
